message:
refactor(pages,sources): Improve bundle sizing, deployment, and source handling

Miscellaneous improvements to Pages export pipeline and remote source
management for better reliability and user experience.

Bundle sizing (src/pages/size.rs):
- Add BundleVerifier for post-build size validation
- Implement SizeLimitResult with detailed breakdown
- Add per-file size tracking for debugging large bundles
- Improve size estimation accuracy for encrypted content
- Add margin calculation for chunk overhead

GitHub deployment (src/pages/deploy_github.rs):
- Improve error messages for common failure modes
- Add retry logic for transient GitHub API errors
- Better handling of rate limiting responses
- Cleaner progress output during upload

Export improvements (src/export.rs):
- Add missing newline in output formatting

Source configuration (src/sources/config.rs):
- Fix path normalization edge cases
- Improve error messages for invalid configs

Source indexing (src/sources/index.rs):
- Add incremental sync status tracking
- Improve progress reporting granularity
- Better handling of interrupted syncs
- Add source health check before sync

Source probing (src/sources/probe.rs):
- Improve SSH connection timeout handling
- Add fallback for missing SSH config
- Better error categorization for diagnostics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -219,10 +219,10 @@ if command -v cass &> /dev/null; then
     if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
         echo "CASS_HEALTH=OK"
         # Try to get session count from stats
-        STATS=$(cass stats --json 2>/dev/null)
+        STATS=$(cass stats --json 2>/dev/null || echo '{}')
         if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
-            # Extract total conversations from JSON
-            SESSIONS=$(echo "$STATS" | grep -o '"conversations":[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2)
+            # Extract total conversations from JSON (allow whitespace/newlines)
+            SESSIONS=$(echo "$STATS" | tr -d '\n' | sed -n 's/.*"conversations"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*\\([0-9][0-9]*\\).*/\\1/p')
             echo "CASS_SESSIONS=${SESSIONS:-0}"
         fi
     else
